title: zTokenSMP
description: Transform your SMP server with a unique token-based
body:
# 🧱 zTokenSMP - Mob Token Economy Plugin > ᴀ ᴛᴏᴋᴇɴ-ʙᴀsᴇᴅ ᴇᴄᴏɴᴏᴍʏ ᴀɴᴅ ᴀʙɪʟɪᴛɪᴇs ᴘʟᴜɢɪɴ ғᴏʀ ᴍɪɴᴇᴄʀᴀғᴛ sᴍᴘ Transform your SMP server with a unique token-based economy system featuring **20 unique mob tokens**, each with their own special abilities and powers! --- ## ✨ Features 🎯 **Token Economy System** - Earn tokens through mining and mob kills ⚡ **20 Unique Mob Tokens** - Each token grants special abilities with cooldowns 🎮 **Interactive GUI** - Beautiful layered token management interface 🎬 **Join Animations** - Stunning scroll animations for new players 🛡️ **Permission System** - Granular control over token access 📊 **Admin Commands** - Complete token management for operators 🎨 **Resource Pack** - Custom textures and Unicode icons included --- ## 🎮 Commands & Permissions
📋 Click to expand Commands Table | Command | Description | Permission | Aliases | |---------|-------------|------------|---------| | `/token [subcommand]` | Manage your tokens | `ztokensmp.use` | `/bal`, `/balance` | | `/ability [subcommand]` | Manage your abilities | `ztokensmp.use` | `/abilities`, `/skill` | | `/tokens` | Open tokens GUI | `ztokensmp.use` | `/tokengui`, `/mobTokens` | | `/tokensadmin [subcommand]` | Admin token commands | `ztokensmp.admin` | `/tokenadmin`, `/tadmin` |
🔐 Click to expand Permissions Table | Permission | Description | Default | |------------|-------------|---------| | `ztokensmp.*` | All plugin permissions | OP | | `ztokensmp.use` | Basic plugin usage | Everyone | | `ztokensmp.admin` | Administrative commands | OP | | `ztokensmp.token.give` | Give tokens to players | OP | | `ztokensmp.token.take` | Take tokens from players | OP | | `ztokensmp.token.[mob]` | Access to specific mob token | Everyone |
--- ## 🧊 Token Types & Abilities
🟢 Layer 1: Common Tokens • **Zombie Token** - Basic undead powers • **Skeleton Token** - Archery enhancements • **Spider Token** - Wall climbing abilities • **Pig Token** - Speed and agility boost • **Creeper Token** - Explosive resistance
🔵 Layer 2: Rare Tokens • **Blaze Token** - Fire immunity and flame powers • **Guardian Token** - Water breathing and aquatic speed • **Snow Golem Token** - Ice-based abilities • **Wither Skeleton Token** - Wither immunity and dark powers • **Bat Token** - Night vision and flight boost
🟣 Layer 3: Epic Tokens • **Wolf Token** - Pack hunting abilities • **Squid Token** - Underwater mastery • **Enderman Token** - Teleportation powers • **Bee Token** - Pollination and speed • **Horse Token** - Enhanced movement speed
🟠 Layer 4: Legendary Tokens • **Chicken Token** - Feather falling and glide • **Ravager Token** - Brute strength and charging • **Warden Token** - Sonic boom and vibration detection • **Witch Token** - Potion brewing mastery • **Ender Dragon Token** - Ultimate flight and power
--- ## ⚙️ Configuration ```yaml # zTokenSMP Configuration starting-tokens: 100 mining-reward-tokens: 1 mining-reward-chance: 0.1 kill-reward-tokens: 2 death-penalty-tokens: 10 abilities: max-active: 3 deactivate-on-death: true save-interval: 300 debug-mode: false messages: prefix: "&6[zTokenSMP]&r " no-permission: "&cYou don't have permission to use this command." insufficient-tokens: "&cYou don't have enough tokens." ``` --- ## 📋 Requirements - **Minecraft Version:** 1.20.1+ - **Java Version:** 17+ - **Server Software:** Spigot/Paper - **Dependencies:** None required --- ## 📦 Installation 1. Download the latest `zTokenSMP-1.0.0.jar` from releases 2. Place the JAR file in your server's `plugins` folder 3. Restart your server 4. ᴄᴏɴғɪɢᴜʀᴇ ᴛʜᴇ ᴘʟᴜɢɪɴ ɪɴ `config.yml` 5. Apply the included resource pack to your server (optional) --- ## 🎨 Resource Pack Features - 🖼️ **Custom Token Textures** - Unique designs for all 20 tokens - 🔤 **Unicode Font Support** - Special characters for animations - 🎭 **GUI Enhancements** - Beautiful interface elements --- ## 💬 In-Game Messages All messages support Minecraft color codes: - `&6[zTokenSMP]&r ` - Plugin prefix - `&aToken activated successfully!` - Success messages - `&cInsufficient tokens!` - Error messages - `&eYou received a new token!` - Reward notifications --- ## 📄 License This project is licensed under the **MIT License** - see the LICENSE file for details. --- ## 👨‍💻 Author **Made with ❤️ by GamingHuzai** *ᴇɴᴊᴏʏ ʏᴏᴜʀ ᴛᴏᴋᴇɴ ᴀᴅᴠᴇɴᴛᴜʀᴇ!* --- *⚡ Enhance your Minecraft SMP experience with zTokenSMP!*
